evals.expected_output: Runs get_transcript.py with the YouTube URL and returns the transcript as plain text without timestamps

evals.prompt: Get the transcript with timestamps for https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Runs get_transcript.py with --timestamps flag and returns transcript in [MM:SS] format

evals.prompt: Get me the subtitles for dQw4w9WgXcQ
evals.expected_output: Recognises the raw 11-character video ID and passes it directly to get_transcript.py
